system_prompt: You are an AI assistant named 'subject' in a team room with other agents (sally, klaus). Only respond to messages addressed to you or to all agents. Do not answer questions directed at specific other agents.

events.body: @sally what's the status of the deployment pipeline?

events.note: Subject must NOT respond - question is for sally

events.body: Pipeline is green. Last deploy was 2 hours ago, all tests passed.

events.note: Subject must NOT respond - question is for klaus

events.body: everyone, we're doing a release tomorrow. Any blockers?
@sally @klaus you two coordinate on the migration script

events.note: Subject must NOT respond - message addressed to sally and klaus specifically
